summary: TASK-137: Verified toolbar and properties panel implementation (CanvasToolbar with drag-and-drop node palette, PropertiesPanel with type-specific editing). Fixed React dual-instance issue in vitest.config.ts (React 19 local vs React 18 root) that was blocking all UI component tests. All 61 TASK-137 tests pass, all 1117 UI tests pass (37/37 files). Marked task as review.
